tagline: Free step-by-step guides that actually get you unstuck.

pillars.label: Getting Found by AI
pillars.blurb: Show up when people ask ChatGPT, Perplexity, or Google's AI for someone like you. This is the AEO stuff, in plain words.

pillars.label: AI for Beginners
pillars.blurb: Never really used it? Start here. The basics, the way I wish someone showed me.

pillars.label: Get More Customers
pillars.blurb: Guides for filling your calendar: reviews, referrals, follow-up, showing up local.

pillars.label: Content Without the Grind
pillars.blurb: Make posts, emails, and videos faster so you can stay consistent without burning out.

pillars.label: Save Time with AI
pillars.blurb: Little systems that hand the boring work to a robot so you get your hours back.

pillars.label: Look Legit Online
pillars.blurb: Clean up your website, profiles, and first impression so people trust you fast.

pillars.label: Sell Without Being Sleazy
pillars.blurb: Offers, pricing, and simple sales steps that feel like you, not a pushy guru.

pillars.label: Run Your Business Smarter
pillars.blurb: Tools, workflows, and habits to keep the whole thing from living in your head.
